name: Ginger Lemongrass-Scented Salmon En Papillote
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 4 pieces of aluminum foil, each measuring 12 inches by 12 inches.
2. Place one salmon fillet in the center of each piece of foil.
3. Top each salmon fillet with a mixture of chestnuts, carrots, onions, ginger, and lemongrass.
4. Sprinkle soy sauce, sesame oil, and cilantro over the fish.
5. Add butter on top of the fish.
6. Fold the edges of the foil to create a sealed packet.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 minutes.
8. Carefully open the packets and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
